ideation: This sequence depicts the gentle, repetitive motion of using prayer beads.  The animation will focus on the right hand, with the left arm remaining mostly still for contrast.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, reflecting the meditative nature of the action.  Frame 1 will show both arms at rest. Frame 2 will show the right hand beginning to move the beads, with the wrist slightly flexed. Frame 3 shows the hand in the middle of the motion, and the fourth frame shows the hand nearing the end of the motion. Frame 5 shows the hand returning to a resting position.

frames.beat: both arms rest, still and waiting
the right hand begins to gently move the beads
the hand slides smoothly through the prayer beads
continuing the slow, meditative slide of the beads
the right hand settles back into stillness
